metadata.title: VasaVant: Operational Intelligence Studio
metadata.description: Turn scattered data and manual workflows into structured intelligence systems.

hero.subtitle: VasaVant turns scattered data and manual workflows into structured intelligence systems you can query, automate, and operate through AI-assisted agents.
hero.imageAlt: Team collaborating on operational workflows with dashboards and connected tools

problem.label: The problem
problem.description: Most companies run on controlled chaos: critical information in silos, workflows dependent on manual intervention, operational visibility a constant luxury.
problem.toolsLabel: Built with tools you already use
problem.imageAlt: Scattered business tools flowing into a unified operational intelligence system

testimonial.quote: The agent is only as useful as the system underneath it. We structure the operation first, then deploy intelligence.
testimonial.imageAlt: Abstract editorial portrait representing a VasaVant client voice

solution.bannerTitle: We're transparent with the stack: structure first, intelligence second.
solution.maturityFooter: VasaVant guides your organization through this progression, building each layer systematically until you achieve full operational intelligence.

howWeWork.label: Our process
howWeWork.title: How we work
howWeWork.footerSuffix: depending on scope. Full eight-step execution available on engagement.

services.label: Capabilities
services.title: Two models, one mission for you

useCases.label: Use cases
useCases.title: Built for real operations
useCases.subtitle: Five industries we ship for most often. Same method, different operational shape.

finalCta.title: Ready to transform your everyday?
finalCta.description: Turn scattered operations into structured intelligence. We'll help you build the operational layer for AI-assisted execution.
finalCta.imageAlt: Person at a desk with connected workflow and application icons

footer.description: Operational intelligence systems for real-world businesses.

processPillars.title: Map the operation
processPillars.description: Understand workflows, data sources, and where decisions actually happen.

processPillars.title: Structure the data
processPillars.description: Unified schemas and process rules so intelligence has something solid to run on.

processPillars.title: Automate & report
processPillars.description: Dashboards, triggers, and routing that remove manual reporting overhead.

processPillars.title: Deploy agents
processPillars.description: Conversational access and autonomous execution on top of your operational layer.

featuredServices.title: Conversational Business Intelligence
featuredServices.subtitle: Query your operation from WhatsApp
featuredServices.description: Ask your business what is happening and get an answer. Natural-language access to operational data without opening another dashboard.
bullets: Instant answers from live operational data
No new app for your team to learn

featuredServices.title: Agentic Operations
featuredServices.subtitle: Autonomous execution on solid architecture
featuredServices.description: Digital agents that navigate internal systems, parse documents, update records, and run repetitive administration.

processSteps.title: Operational diagnosis
processSteps.description: Map workflows, data silos, and critical decision points.

processSteps.title: Data architecture
processSteps.description: Unified model, business rules, and sources of truth.

processSteps.title: Integrations
processSteps.description: Connect WhatsApp, CRM, ERP, and existing tools.

processSteps.title: Automations
processSteps.description: Triggers, routing, and removal of repetitive manual work.

processSteps.title: Dashboards & alerts
processSteps.description: Real-time operational visibility for every role.

processSteps.title: Digital agents
processSteps.description: Assisted and autonomous execution on the operational layer.

processSteps.title: Iteration & scale
processSteps.description: Continuous improvement, new use cases, and team expansion.

useCaseCards.title: Logistics & Trucking

meta.title: Use Cases | VasaVant
meta.description: Five industries where we deploy operational intelligence with the same method.

hero.title: Built for real operations
hero.subtitle: Same method, different operational shape. Explore how we structure data, workflows, and agents in each industry.
hero.imageAlt: Editorial collage of five operational industries connected by one unified system

meta.title: Logistics & Trucking | VasaVant
meta.description: Fleet, trip, and delivery tracking with structured operational intelligence.

hero.title: Logistics & Trucking
hero.subtitle: Fleet, trip, and maintenance visibility in one queryable, automatable system.
hero.imageAlt: Illustration of fleet, delivery routes, and unified logistics dashboard

challenges: Trip data scattered across WhatsApp, sheets, and ERP
Low visibility into utilization per unit or route
outcomes: Unified trip and status logging in real time
Conversational queries on fleet and deliveries
logistics.imageAlt: Fleet and routes connected to operational dashboard

meta.title: Field Operations | VasaVant
meta.description: Real-time coordination of teams, assets, and location.

hero.title: Field Operations & Assets
hero.subtitle: Equipment utilization, location, and team coordination from a single operational layer.
hero.imageAlt: Field teams with geolocated assets and coordination dashboard

challenges: Coordination via messages without structured records
Assets without usage history or reliable location
Field reports arriving late or incomplete
outcomes: Instant visibility into asset and team status
Auditable history per asset and visit

meta.title: Sales Operations | VasaVant
meta.description: Pipeline, leads, and commercial follow-up on structured data.

hero.title: Sales Operations
hero.subtitle: Pipeline visibility, lead routing, and follow-up without friction in your CRM.
hero.imageAlt: Commercial pipeline with routed leads and conversion metrics

challenges: Opaque pipeline across CRM, sheets, and messages
Leads without routing or clear SLAs
outcomes: Unified pipeline with stages and owners
Instant answers on sales and conversion

meta.title: Production & Yield | VasaVant
meta.description: Real-time production, quality, and bottleneck dashboards.

hero.title: Production & Yield
hero.subtitle: Daily metrics, quality, and bottlenecks visible to plant and leadership.
hero.imageAlt: Production line with yield and quality metrics on dashboard

challenges: Plant data in manual or isolated records
Quality and yield without real-time correlation

meta.title: Client & Project Management | VasaVant
meta.description: Centralized timelines, communication, and delivery milestones.

hero.title: Client & Project Management
hero.subtitle: Communication, milestones, and deliveries in one place for teams and clients.
hero.imageAlt: Project timeline with milestones and centralized communication

challenges: Client context scattered across email and chat
Milestones without alerts or clear owners
Low visibility into load per project
outcomes: Single timeline per client and project
client-projects.imageAlt: Projects and milestones in unified system
